title: High-Density Diffuse Optical Tomography Audiovisual Movie Viewing Dataset
description: This dataset comprises high-density diffuse optical tomography (HD-DOT) neuroimaging data from 5 participants performing functional localizer and naturalistic movie viewing tasks. Data are provided in SNIRF format with optode positions and anatomical landmarks registered to subject-specific head models, enabling investigation of brain function during audiovisual stimulation using optical neuroimaging methods.
methods_description: Participants completed functional localizer and movie viewing tasks while undergoing high-density diffuse optical tomography acquisition. Optode locations and anatomical landmarks were registered to individual head models for each subject.

affiliations.name: Mallinckrodt Institute of Radiology Washington University School of Medicine  St. Louis Missouri USA
